utility_name: Example utility on KUBRA Storm Center
_comment: Discover metadata_url and tile_url_template via browser DevTools -> Network on the utility's outage map. {data_dir} and {quadkey} are filled in by the adapter. seed_quadkeys should bound the service territory; omit to scan from zoom 1.

utility_name: Example utility on an ArcGIS feature layer
_comment: service_url is everything up to (not including) /query. Confirm customers_field by opening the layer URL in a browser and reading the field list.
